name: creative-spark
description: 3 core innovation skills: cross-domain analogy, constraint inversion, and dream-based insight generation
philosophy: AI is constrained but lacks creativity. We keep it minimal - only proven, practical skills that aren't redundant with AI's built-in capabilities.
skills_included: cross-domain: Borrows solutions from nature/art/other fields
deep-dream: Uses dream logic to reframe problems and reveal unexpected insights
